signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: My sense is that in the U.S., consumers remain cautious right now, and they are being very intentional about their buying decisions.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: We are managing expenses prudently while also continuing to invest to drive long-term growth... new store openings and optimizations, new market entries, growing brand awareness.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We are planning to take strategic price increases, looking item by item across our assortment... price increases on a small portion of our assortment, and they will be modest in nature.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: Given the uncertainties in the macro environment, our approach to planning remains balanced... we feel it is prudent to tick up our forecast slightly on the markdown line.
